1506400015.english: If it's urgent, you should've said so.

1506400016.korean: 여기는 내가 보고 있을 테니까 어서 다녀와.
1506400016.english: I'll keep an eye on things here, so go quickly.

1506400018.english: What's wrong? Taking so long to come back?

1506400023.korean:
응… 매우… 상쾌…
오래… 참음… 그래서… 기분 좋아…
1506400023.english: Yeah... very... refreshed... I've been holding back for a long time... so... I feel good...

1506400026.korean: 그건 그렇고, 주공의 명을 받아 정보 수집을 위해 북미 지역에 잠입했는데...
1506400026.english: Anyway, by the command of the Lord, I infiltrated North America to gather intel...

1506400027.korean: 이대로 아무 수확도 없이 돌아가는 건, 주공을 볼 면목이 없어요.
1506400027.english: Going back empty-handed like this would be no good for the Lord's reputation.

1506400028.english: Agreed... it's for the public good...

1506400029.korean: 그렇다고 경비가 삼엄한 안쪽으로 무턱대고 들어갈 수도 없고…
1506400029.english: But that doesn't mean we can just barge into the heavily guarded inner area...

1506400033.english: It… quieted? Are you okay, sis?

1506400036.english: What is this…? The sky’s turned red…?

1506400037.korean:
대체 무슨 일이 일어나고…
앗? 저건 대체…?
1506400037.english: What on earth is happening…? Huh? What the heck is that…?

1506400041.korean:
잠깐, 잠깐 진정해.
나는 적이 아니야.
1506400041.english: Hold on, hold on, calm down. I'm not an enemy.

1506400043.korean:
휴… 겨우 빠져나왔네… 하마터면 정말로 게임 오버가 될 뻔했어.
자, 그럼…
1506400043.english: Phew… we barely got out… we almost actually hit game over. Now, then…

1506400044.korean:
시간이 많이 없어.
어서 사령관에게 이곳에서 일어나는 일을 알려야 해.
1506400044.english: We don’t have much time. We need to tell the commander what’s happening here right away.
